pool.title: How to Actually Run Your Coding Agent Safely (And Avoid the Horror Stories)
pool.description:
Every coding agent ships a mode that skips the approval prompts, and we all turn it on. The problem is what stands between that agent and your machine, which is nothing. It has your filesystem, your database, your SSH keys. It doesn't take malice or a hack for that to go wrong, just one bad decision, and it has already happened to plenty of builders.

Rules aren't enough to keep your agent from go
